items.title: Speaking of Voxtral
items.summary_short: Voxtral TTS: A frontier, open-weights text-to-speech model that’s fast, instantly adaptable, and produces lifelike speech for voice agents
items.summary_short_zh: Voxtral TTS：一款前沿的开放权重文本转语音模型，速度快、可即时适配，并能为语音代理生成逼真的语音

items.title: Introducing Command R7B: Fast and efficient generative AI | Cohere Blog
items.summary_short: The smallest model in our R series delivers top-tier speed, efficiency, and quality to build powerful AI applications on commodity GPUs and edge devices

topic_refs.headline: Introducing Command R7B: Fast and efficient generative AI | Cohere Blog

items.title_zh: Introducing Command R7B：快速高效的生成式 AI | Cohere 博客
items.summary_short_zh: 我们 R 系列中最小的模型，以顶级的速度、效率和质量，在通用 GPU 和边缘设备上构建强大的 AI 应用

items.title: Creating with Sora Safely
items.summary_short: To address the novel safety challenges posed by a state-of-the-art video model as well as a new social creation platform, we’ve built Sora 2 and the Sora app with safety at the foundation. Our approach is anchored in concrete protections
items.title_zh: 安全地使用 Sora 进行创作
items.summary_short_zh: 为应对最先进视频模型以及全新社交创作平台带来的新型安全挑战，我们在构建 Sora 2 和 Sora 应用时将安全作为基础。我们的方法建立在切实的保护措施之上

items.title: Any-Subgroup Equivariant Networks via Symmetry Breaking
items.summary_short: The inclusion of symmetries as an inductive bias, known as equivariance, often improves generalization on geometric data (e.g. grids, sets, and graphs).

topic_refs.headline: Any-Subgroup Equivariant Networks via Symmetry Breaking

items.title_zh: 通过对称性破缺实现任意子群等变网络
items.summary_short_zh: 将对称性作为一种归纳偏置纳入模型（称为等变性）通常能提升几何数据（如网格、集合和图）上的泛化能力。

items.title: Adaptive Layerwise Perturbation: Unifying Off-Policy Corrections for LLM RL
items.summary_short: Off-policy problems such as policy staleness and training-inference mismatch, has become a major bottleneck for training stability and further exploration for LLM RL.

topic_refs.headline: Adaptive Layerwise Perturbation: Unifying Off-Policy Corrections for LLM RL

items.title_zh: 自适应逐层扰动：统一用于 LLM 强化学习的离策略校正
items.summary_short_zh: 策略陈旧和训练-推理不匹配等离策略问题，已成为 LLM 强化学习训练稳定性和进一步探索的主要瓶颈。

items.title: LeWorldModel: Stable End-to-End Joint-Embedding Predictive Architecture from Pixels
items.summary_short: Joint Embedding Predictive Architectures (JEPAs) offer a compelling framework for learning world models in compact latent spaces, yet existing methods remain fragile, relying on complex multi-term losses, exponential moving averages, pre-trained encoders, or auxiliary supervision to avoid

topic_refs.headline: LeWorldModel: Stable End-to-End Joint-Embedding Predictive Architecture from Pixels

items.title_zh: LeWorldModel：从像素出发的稳定端到端联合嵌入预测架构
items.summary_short_zh: 联合嵌入预测架构（JEPA）为在紧凑潜在空间中学习世界模型提供了一个极具吸引力的框架，但现有方法仍然较为脆弱，依赖复杂的多项损失、指数滑动平均、预训练编码器或辅助监督来避免

items.title: Neural Dynamics Self-Attention for Spiking Transformers
items.summary_short: Integrating Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) with Transformer architectures offers a promising pathway to balance energy efficiency and performance, particularly for edge vision applications.

topic_refs.headline: Neural Dynamics Self-Attention for Spiking Transformers

items.title_zh: 用于脉冲 Transformer 的神经动力学自注意力
items.summary_short_zh: 将脉冲神经网络（SNN）与 Transformer 架构结合，为兼顾能效与性能提供了一条很有前景的路径，尤其适用于边缘视觉应用。

items.title: Hyperagents
items.summary_short: Self-improving AI systems aim to reduce reliance on human engineering by learning to improve their own learning and problem-solving processes. Existing approaches to self-improvement rely on fixed, handcrafted meta-level mechanisms, fundamentally limiting how fast such systems can improve.
items.summary_short_zh: 自我改进型 AI 系统旨在通过学习提升自身的学习与问题求解过程，从而减少对人工工程的依赖。现有自我改进方法依赖固定的、手工设计的元层机制，从根本上限制了这类系统的改进速度。

items.title: Minimax Generalized Cross-Entropy
items.summary_short: Loss functions play a central role in supervised classification. Cross-entropy (CE) is widely used, whereas the mean absolute error (MAE) loss can offer robustness but is difficult to optimize.
items.summary_short_zh: 损失函数在监督分类中起核心作用。交叉熵（CE）被广泛使用，而平均绝对误差（MAE）损失虽具备鲁棒性，但难以优化。

items.title: IsoCLIP: Decomposing CLIP Projectors for Efficient Intra-modal Alignment
items.summary_short: Vision-Language Models like CLIP are extensively used for inter-modal tasks which involve both visual and text modalities.

topic_refs.headline: IsoCLIP: Decomposing CLIP Projectors for Efficient Intra-modal Alignment

items.title_zh: IsoCLIP：分解 CLIP 投影器以实现高效模态内对齐
items.summary_short_zh: 像 CLIP 这样的视觉-语言模型被广泛用于涉及视觉和文本两种模态的跨模态任务。

items.title: Heavy-Tailed and Long-Range Dependent Noise in Stochastic Approximation: A Finite-Time Analysis
items.summary_short: Stochastic approximation (SA) is a fundamental iterative framework with broad applications in reinforcement learning and optimization.

topic_refs.headline: Heavy-Tailed and Long-Range Dependent Noise in Stochastic Approximation: A Finite-Time Analysis

items.title_zh: 随机逼近中的重尾与长程相关噪声：有限时间分析
items.summary_short_zh: 随机逼近（SA）是一种基础性的迭代框架，在强化学习和优化中有广泛应用。

items.title: Breaking the Capability Ceiling of LLM Post-Training by Reintroducing Markov States
items.summary_short: Reinforcement learning (RL) has become a standard paradigm for post-training and aligning Large Language Models (LLMs), yet recent evidence suggests it faces a persistent "capability ceiling": unlike classical RL systems that discover novel strategies, RL for LLMs often acts as a mere refiner of

topic_refs.headline: Breaking the Capability Ceiling of LLM Post-Training by Reintroducing Markov States

items.title_zh: 通过重新引入马尔可夫状态打破 LLM 后训练的能力上限
items.summary_short_zh: 强化学习（RL）已成为大语言模型（LLM）后训练与对齐的标准范式，但最新证据表明它面临持续存在的“能力上限”：不同于能发现新策略的经典 RL 系统，面向 LLM 的 RL 往往只是对

items.title: Beyond Single Tokens: Distilling Discrete Diffusion Models via Discrete MMD
items.summary_short: It is currently difficult to distill discrete diffusion models. In contrast, continuous diffusion literature has many distillation approaches methods that can reduce sampling steps to a handful.

topic_refs.headline: Beyond Single Tokens: Distilling Discrete Diffusion Models via Discrete MMD

items.title_zh: 超越单一 token：通过离散 MMD 蒸馏离散扩散模型
items.summary_short_zh: 当前离散扩散模型的蒸馏仍较为困难。相比之下，连续扩散领域已有许多蒸馏方法，可将采样步数减少到寥寥几步。

items.title: Inducing Sustained Creativity and Diversity in Large Language Models
items.summary_short: We address a not-widely-recognized subset of exploratory search, where a user sets out on a typically long "search quest" for the perfect wedding dress, overlooked research topic, killer company idea, etc.

topic_refs.headline: Inducing Sustained Creativity and Diversity in Large Language Models

items.title_zh: 在大语言模型中诱导持续的创造力与多样性
items.summary_short_zh: 我们研究了探索式搜索中一个尚未被广泛认识的子领域：用户通常会开启一段漫长的“搜索之旅”，去寻找完美的婚纱、被忽视的研究课题、极具潜力的公司创意等。

items.title: Growing Networks with Autonomous Pruning
items.summary_short: This paper introduces Growing Networks with Autonomous Pruning (GNAP) for image classification.
items.title_zh: 通过自主剪枝生长网络
items.summary_short_zh: 本文提出了用于图像分类的自主剪枝生长网络（GNAP）。

topics.summary_short_zh: 强化学习（RL）已成为大语言模型（LLM）后训练与对齐的标准范式，但近期证据表明它面临持续存在的“能力天花板”：不同于能够发现新策略的经典 RL 系统，用于 LLM 的 RL 往往只是对……的简单优化

topics.headline: CLaRE-ty Amid Chaos: Quantifying Representational Entanglement to Predict Ripple Effects in LLM Editing
topics.summary_short: The static knowledge representations of large language models (LLMs) inevitably become outdated or incorrect over time.
topics.why_it_matters: This research paper surfaced across 1 independent source(s).

evidence.title: CLaRE-ty Amid Chaos: Quantifying Representational Entanglement to Predict Ripple Effects in LLM Editing

topics.headline_zh: 混乱中的 CLaRE-ty：量化表征纠缠以预测 LLM 编辑中的连锁效应
topics.summary_short_zh: 大语言模型（LLM）的静态知识表征不可避免地会随着时间推移而过时或出错。

topics.headline: DAPA: Distribution Aware Piecewise Activation Functions for On-Device Transformer Inference and Training
topics.summary_short: Non-linear activation functions play a pivotal role in on-device inference and training, as they not only consume substantial hardware resources but also impose a significant impact on system performance and energy efficiency.
topics.why_it_matters: This research paper surfaced across 1 independent source(s).

evidence.title: DAPA: Distribution Aware Piecewise Activation Functions for On-Device Transformer Inference and Training
evidence.title_zh: DAPA：面向端侧 Transformer 推理与训练的分布感知分段激活函数

topics.headline_zh: DAPA：面向端侧 Transformer 推理与训练的分布感知分段激活函数
topics.summary_short_zh: 非线性激活函数在端侧推理与训练中起着关键作用，因为它们不仅消耗大量硬件资源，还会对系统性能和能效产生显著影响。
topics.why_it_matters_zh: 这篇研究论文出现在 1 个独立来源中。

topics.headline: Do Post-Training Algorithms Actually Differ? A Controlled Study Across Model Scales Uncovers Scale-Dependent Ranking Inversions
topics.summary_short: Post-training alignment has produced dozens of competing algorithms -- DPO, SimPO, KTO, GRPO, and others -- yet practitioners lack controlled comparisons to guide algorithm selection.
topics.why_it_matters: This research paper surfaced across 1 independent source(s).

evidence.title: Do Post-Training Algorithms Actually Differ? A Controlled Study Across Model Scales Uncovers Scale-Dependent Ranking Inversions
evidence.title_zh: 后训练算法真的有差异吗？一项跨模型规模的受控研究揭示了随规模变化的排名反转

topics.headline_zh: 后训练算法真的有差异吗？一项跨模型规模的受控研究揭示了随规模变化的排名反转
topics.summary_short_zh: 后训练对齐已产生数十种相互竞争的算法——DPO、SimPO、KTO、GRPO 等——但实践者仍缺乏可用于指导算法选择的受控比较。
topics.why_it_matters_zh: 这篇研究论文出现在 1 个独立来源中。

topics.headline: Hyperagents
topics.summary_short: Self-improving AI systems aim to reduce reliance on human engineering by learning to improve their own learning and problem-solving processes. Existing approaches to self-improvement rely on fixed, handcrafted meta-level mechanisms, fundamentally limiting how fast such systems can improve.
topics.why_it_matters: This research paper surfaced across 1 independent source(s).
topics.summary_short_zh: 自我改进型 AI 系统旨在通过学习改进自身的学习和问题求解过程，从而减少对人工工程的依赖。现有自我改进方法依赖固定的、手工设计的元层机制，从根本上限制了这类系统提升速度。
topics.why_it_matters_zh: 这篇研究论文出现在 1 个独立来源中。

topics.headline: Minimax Generalized Cross-Entropy
topics.summary_short: Loss functions play a central role in supervised classification. Cross-entropy (CE) is widely used, whereas the mean absolute error (MAE) loss can offer robustness but is difficult to optimize.
topics.why_it_matters: This research paper surfaced across 1 independent source(s).
topics.summary_short_zh: 损失函数在监督分类中起核心作用。交叉熵（CE）被广泛使用，而平均绝对误差（MAE）损失虽然更具鲁棒性，但难以优化。

x_buzz.title: Creating with Sora Safely
x_buzz.summary: To address the novel safety challenges posed by a state-of-the-art video model as well as a new social creation platform, we’ve built Sora 2 and the Sora app with safety at the foundation. Our approach is anchored in concrete protections.
